introSection: Atomic Coaster (Japanese: アトミックコースター) was a steel shuttle roller coaster previously located at Japan Monkey Park in Inuyama, Aichi, Japan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The train engaged the Chain lift hill forwards, traversing the rest of the layout backwards.

fullText:
Atomic Coaster (Japanese: アトミックコースター) was a steel shuttle roller coaster previously located at Japan Monkey Park in Inuyama, Aichi, Japan.

The train engaged the Chain lift hill forwards, traversing the rest of the layout backwards.

Yellow track and blue supports.
